name: lexsis
description: AI skills for building high-converting Shopify landing pages with Lexsis AI

plugins.name: lexsis-storefront-skills
plugins.description: Core skills for AI-powered Shopify page generation — 30 skills, 14 commands, auto MCP config. PDP, landing pages, homepages, collections, editorials, bundles, A/B tests, and more.

plugins.name: lexsis-beauty-skills
plugins.description: Beauty/skincare industry expertise — ingredient displays, before/after patterns, shade finders, routine builders. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.

plugins.name: lexsis-supplements-skills
plugins.description: Supplement/wellness industry expertise — clinical data layouts, dosage info, subscription patterns, trust signals. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.

plugins.name: lexsis-fashion-skills
plugins.description: Fashion/apparel industry expertise — size guides, lookbooks, model specs, style pairing. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.

plugins.name: lexsis-food-skills
plugins.description: Food/beverage DTC industry expertise — flavor profiles, subscription boxes, recipe integration. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.

plugins.name: lexsis-luxury-skills
plugins.description: Luxury/premium brand expertise — editorial restraint, heritage storytelling, exclusivity. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.

plugins.name: lexsis-home-skills
plugins.description: Home goods/decor industry expertise — room scenes, measurement guides, material specs. Install lexsis-storefront-skills first.
